series_metadata.series_description: These reports are sent to the Department of Agriculture annually as a package by county and independent fairs. The reports contain e.g. an annual financial report, Fair Dates Request, Junior Fair Summary, poll books, and a Fair Fund Request. These packages contain all of the information pertinent to the issuance of Junior Fair Reimbursement and Ohio Fairs Fund checks.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep audit if no findings recovery
